name: test_watcher_shutdown_no_outage
description:
Test watcher shutdown - should not cause service outage.

    Expected behavior:
    - No outage experienced by either primary or replica
    - Cluster continues to function (but loses quorum guarantee)
descriptionHtml:
Test watcher shutdown - should not cause service outage.

Expected behavior:
- No outage experienced by either primary or replica
- Cluster continues to function (but loses quorum guarantee)
